{
    internal sealed partial class TypeShapeProvider_TestAssembly
    {
        /// <summary>Gets a generated shape for the specified type.</summary>
        #nullable disable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        public global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, int>> Dictionary_String_Int32 => __Dictionary_String_Int32 ?? __Init_Singleton(ref __Dictionary_String_Int32, __Create_Dictionary_String_Int32());
        #nullable enable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, int>>? __Dictionary_String_Int32;

        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, int>> __Create_Dictionary_String_Int32()
        {
            return new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenDictionaryTypeShape<global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, int>, string, int>
            {
                KeyTypeFactory = () => String,
                ValueTypeFactory = () => Int32,
                GetDictionary = static obj => obj,
                SupportedComparer = global::PolyType.Abstractions.CollectionComparerOptions.EqualityComparer,
                ConstructionStrategy = global::PolyType.Abstractions.CollectionConstructionStrategy.Mutable,
                DefaultConstructor = static (in global::PolyType.Abstractions.CollectionConstructionOptions<string> options) => new global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, int>(options.Capacity ?? 0, options.EqualityComparer!),
                OverwritingInserter = static (ref global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, int> dict, string key, int value) => { dict[key] = value; return true; },
                DiscardingInserter = static (ref global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, int> dict, string key, int value) => dict.TryAdd(key, value),
                ThrowingInserter = static (ref global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, int> dict, string key, int value) => { dict.Add(key, value); return true; },
                Provider = this,
            };
        }
    }
